title: Another To The Maids
content:
Wash your hands, or else the fire
Will not tend to your desire;
Unwashed hands, ye maidens, know,
Dead the fire, though ye blow.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Another To The Maids"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
